title: Blem PSA Dagger Micro X-1 9mm Pistol - Shield Cut, Non-Threaded Barrel, Flat Dark Earth

product_details.front_sight: White Dot Day Sight
product_details.rear_sight: White Two Dot Day Sight

features:
Blem - PSA Dagger Micro X-1 Pistol

A slim-line-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger Micro X-1 with Extreme Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol meets today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger Micro is fed from a supplied PSA Dagger Micro Polymer (15-Round) Magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger Micro is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet it also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The Extreme Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The slide is also finished in FDE Cerakote and Shield RMSc Optics Cut for compatibility with like-style reflex sights. Includes optics plate and screws. 

Additional Features:

Ergonomic Grip Shape

Shield RMSc Cut Optics Mount

Extreme Carry Cuts™ on Slide

Aggressive Grip Texturing

Striker Fired

Flat Faced Trigger

Striker Block Safety and Trigger Safety

White Dot Day Sights

Stainless Steel Recoil Spring Guide Rod

FDE Cerakote

DLC Coated Barrel

15rd Magazine

title: PSA Dagger Compact 9mm Pistol With SW1 Extreme Carry Cut RMR Slide & Non-Threaded Barrel, Black

product_details.rear_sight: Co-Witness, Black (Not a Night Sight)

features:
A compact-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger with Extreme Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 15 GL9™ (15-Round) magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Extreme Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The slide is also finished with a Black Cerakote finish and RMR footprint for compatibility with RMR style reflex sights. A black cover plate is also included.
 The PSA Dagger SW1 Slide features optics cut positioned behind the front and rear sight offering the perfect co-witness sight picture. The milled windows on the left and right sides of the slide create an enhanced look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol. 
 Ships in Palmetto State Armory Soft Pistol Case.

title: PSA Dagger Compact 9mm Pistol With SW2 ECC RMR Slide & Gold TiN Threaded Barrel, Sniper Green

product_details.model: Palmetto Dagger CompactCaliber: 9mmAction: Striker FiredWeight: 22.4oz (unloaded)Overall Length: 7.65"Overall Width: 1.28"Overall Height: 4.78" (Without Mag)Barrel Profile: Threaded with Thread ProtectorThread Pitch: 1/2x28 TPIBarrel Length: 4.5"Barrel Material: Stainless SteelBarrel Finish: Gold TiNTwist Rate: SAAMI Spec 1:10Slide Material: Stainless SteelSlide Finish: Sniper GreenFrame: Polymer, Sniper GreenFront Sight: Co-Witness Day Sight (Not a Night Sight)Rear Sight: Co-Witness Day Sight (Not A Night Sight)Safety: Striker Block Safety & Trigger SafetyMagazine: Comes with One (1) 15rd Magazine

features:
A compact-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger with Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 15 GL9™ (15-Round) magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The slide is also finished with a Sniper Green cerakote and RMR footprint for compatibility with like-style reflex sights. A black cover plate is also included.

The PSA Dagger SW2 Rear Sight Rear Slide features optics cut positioned in front of the rear sight offering the perfect co-witness sight picture. The milled windows on the left and right sides of the slide create an enhanced look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol. 

Additional Features:

Ergonomic Grip Shape

RMR Optics Mount

SW4 Window Cuts on Slide

Extreme Carry Cuts™ on Slide

Aggressive Grip Texturing

Striker Fired

Flat Faced Trigger

Striker Block Safety and Trigger Safety

Co-Witness Day Sights (Not a Night Sight)

Stainless Steel Recoil Spring Guide Rod

Sniper Green Cerakoted Slide

Gold TiN Threaded Barrel

title: PSA Dagger Full Size - S 9mm Pistol With SWRV2 RMR Slide & Chameleon Threaded Barrel, Black

product_details.rear_sight: Co-Witness Day Sight

features:
A Full-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger Full Size - S with Extreme Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 17 GL9™ (17-Round) magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Extreme Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The slide is also finished with a Black Cerakote coating.

The PSA Dagger SWRV2 Raptor Slide features milled windows on the left and right sides of the slide create an enhanced look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol

The PSA Full Size - S Dagger offers the ergonomics of a full-size frame while utilizing a compact slide. Our Full Size - S Dagger is compatible with all of our Dagger Compact slides and components.

Ships in Palmetto State Armory Soft Pistol Case. 

Additional Features:

Ergonomic Grip Shape

features:
A full-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger with Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 17-Round magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The slide is also finished with a Black Cerakote finish and RMR footprint for compatibility with like-style reflex sights. A black cover plate is also included.

The PSA Dagger SW3 Gatormouth Slide features milled windows on both sides of the slide, as well as a gator mouth-like concave cut to the front of the slide to create an enhanced look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol.

product_details.front_sight: Co-Witness Day Sight (Not a Night Sight)
product_details.rear_sight: Co-Witness Day Sight (Not A Night Sight)

features:
A full-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger with Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 17-Round magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The slide is also finished with a Black Cerakote finish and RMR footprint for compatibility with like-style reflex sights. A black cover plate is also included.

The PSA Dagger SW3 Gatormouth Slide features milled windows on both sides of the slide, as well as a gator mouth-like concave cut to the front of the slide to create an enhanced look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol.

Additional Features:

Ergonomic Grip Shape

RMR Optics Mount

SW3 Window Cuts on Slide

Extreme Carry Cuts™ on Slide

Aggressive Grip Texturing

Striker Fired

Flat Faced Trigger

Striker Block Safety and Trigger Safety

Co-Witness Day Sights (Not a Night Sight)

Stainless Steel Recoil Spring Guide Rod

Cerakote Black Slide

DLC Threaded Barrel

17rd Magazine (1)

PSA Dagger Soft Pistol Case

title: PSA Dagger Full Size - S 9mm SW6 RMR Pistol With Copper Threaded Barrel, Sniper Green

product_details.front_sight: 2XL Tall Sight (Not a Night Sight)
product_details.rear_sight: 2XL Tall Sight (Not a Night Sight)

features:
A compact-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger with Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 15 GL9™ (15-Round) magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. 

The PSA Dagger SW6 Slide features large side windows, aggressive serrations on top, and a dimpled texture on the rear of the slide to enhance the look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol. This PSA Dagger Slide with RMR footprint is complete, with a Threaded Copper PVD barrel and recoil spring assembly, ready to install on your PSA Dagger frame, and includes 2XL Sights and a Sniper Green Cerakote finish. 

Additional Features:

Ergonomic Grip Shape

RMR Cut SW6 Window Cuts on Slide

Extreme Carry Cuts™ on Slide

Aggressive Grip Texturing

Striker Fired

Flat Faced Trigger

Striker Block Safety and Trigger Safety

Co-Witness Sights, Black Serrated Sights (These are not night sights)

Stainless Steel Recoil Spring Guide Rod

Sniper Green Cerakote Slide 

Threaded, Copper PVD Barrel

1x 17rd Magazine

title: PSA Dagger Full Size - S 9mm SW6 RMR Pistol With Threaded Barrel &10-17rd Mags, Flat Dark Earth

product_details.front_sight: Co-Witness Day Sight (Not a Night Sight)
product_details.rear_sight: Co-Witness Day Sight (Not A Night Sight)

features:
A Full-sized polymer-framed pistol, the Palmetto Dagger Full Size - S with Extreme Carry Cuts™ introduces game-changing ergonomics and controllability. Made from high-quality stainless steel and advanced polymers, this pistol lives up to today's highest expectations while maintaining the unmatched Palmetto State Armory value. Chambered in 9x19mm, the Palmetto Dagger is fed from a supplied PMAG® 17 GL9™ (17-Round) magazine and operated by a smooth single-action striker-fired trigger mechanism. The Palmetto Dagger is feature-rich even in its standard form, yet also provides a framework for further customization, as it is highly compatible with many aftermarket offerings. The new Extreme Carry Cuts™ offer smoother edges to the rear and front of the slide to help with faster drawing without snagging the user's holster. The RMR slide is also finished with a Black Cerakote coating.

The PSA Dagger SW6 Slide features optics cut positioned behind the front and rear sight offering the perfect co-witness sight picture. The milled windows on the left and right sides of the slide create an enhanced look and feel, to the already distinguished design of the PSA Dagger, while also reducing the overall weight of your pistol.

Ships in Palmetto State Armory Soft Pistol Case. 

Additional Features:


Ergonomic Grip Shape
SW6 Window Cuts on Slide
Aggressive Grip Texturing
Striker Fired
Flat Faced Trigger
Striker Block Safety and Trigger Safety
Co-Witness Day Sight (Not a Night Sight)
Stainless Steel Recoil Spring Guide Rod
Polymer Frame, FDE 
Stainless Steel Slide, FDE Cerkote 
Threaded Barrel,DLC
Ships with 10x 17rd Magazines
